title: Remote greenhouse crop monitoring for pest and disease risks and alerts (OKO digital, Greenpatrol robot, prospera)
description: A practice abstract presenting remote greenhouse crop monitoring solutions for integrated pest management using technologies such as OKO Digital, GreenPatrol robot, and Prospera. It explains how these systems deliver real-time scouting, AI-based detection, and infestation mapping to reduce labour and support timely decision-making in greenhouse vegetable production.
